## reference · layout spacing 8dp grid keylines

* Use an 8dp grid for layout spacing to ensure consistency and harmony in the design.
* Keylines are the distances between elements, and they should be a multiple of 8dp.
* The 8dp grid helps to create a clear visual hierarchy and makes it easier to align elements.
* Material Design uses a grid-based system to help designers and developers create consistent and beautiful products.

Sources: https://m2.material.io/design/layout/spacing-methods.html
